DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF LIVINGSTON FINANCIAL LLC NOTICE OF HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION (OF CLAIMANT EDWARD NICHOLAS POOR)- THE CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS GRANTED. JUDGMENT DEBTOR HAS SHOWN THAT HIS MONTHLY INCOME, EVEN IGNORING THE DEDUCTION FOR 'SUPPORT' IS NECESSARY FOR HIS SUPPORT AND THEREFORE EXEMPT UNDER CCP 706.051. THE LEVYING OFFICER IS DIRECTED TO RELEASE ANY EARNINGS HELD TO THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, NOT REPORTED.

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Nov-29-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF LIVINGSTON FINANCIAL LLC Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption (of claimant Edward Nicholas Poor)
The claim of exemption is granted. Judgment Debtor has shown that his monthly income, even ignoring the deduction for 'Support' is necessary for his support and therefore exempt under CCP 706.051. The levying officer is directed to release any earnings held to the judgment debtor. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn, not reported.

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Dec-06-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Prove-Up Hearing.
Commissioner: Everett A. Hewlett, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR #2542.

Sophia Andritsakis, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Livingston Financial LLC.
No appearance by defendant Edward Nicholas Poor.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on July 20, 2010.
Declaration of Marjorie Surfori in Lieu of Live Testimony pursuant to Code of Civil Procedure Section 98 was served on August 23, 2010 & filed on August 25, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, December 6, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Livingston Financial LLC, and against defendant Edward Nicholas Poor as follows:

Principal - $24,787.84.
Interest - Reserved.
Attorney Fees - Reserved.
Costs - Reserved.

Total - $24,787.84.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Dec-06-2010 Assigned To Trial Court

Notice And Motion To : 1. Deem Request For Admissions Admitted And 2. For Monetary Sanctions
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
PLAINTIFF LIVINGSTON FINANCIAL LLC'S Motion To: 1) Deem Request For Admissions Admitted And 2) For Monetary Sanctions in the amount of $915.00 is granted. No opposition filed. Moving party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge : Peter J. Busch, NOT REPORTED. = (301/PJB)
